summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDF export functionality for Cafe POS bill generator. All PDF download features working correctly across success toast, bill history table, and bill detail view.

minor_issues.issue: Menu items count validation expects 18 but found 19 items
minor_issues.impact: Test validation only - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/bills/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with HTTP 200
PDF download button appears in bill history table
PDF download button appears in bill detail view
Download PDF link appears in success toast after creating bill
PDF download buttons are clickable and functional
Bill creation end-to-end flow works correctly
Bill history loads and displays correctly
Bill detail view navigation works correctly
PDF files have proper headers and download attributes
All core POS functionality remains intact
